titleStmt.title: SII 37.127: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 127. (A.R. No. E 15 of 1938-39.) Lakshmanēśvaram, Narasapur Taluk, West Godavari District.

summary.p: Pillar in the maṇḍapa of Lakshmanēśvarasvāmin temple, east face and south face.
This is dated in Śaka 1365, Śrīmukha, Āshāḍha śu. 10, Thursday. However, the details are irregular.

It records that Murāninēni Rāmaningāru installed the image of Parāṅkuśa in the big maṇḍapa of god Narasimha of Vēdādri, situated to the east of Gautami and north of Rajamahēndravaram and granted land as sarvamānya to the deity for worship and offerings. He is stated to have purchased the land for 300 ṭankas and deposited the amount in śrībhaṇḍāram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatērāmānujāyanamaḥ svasti śrī śakava
ruṣaṁbulu 1365 Agunēṁṭi śrīmu
kha saṁvvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 10 gu . rāja
mahēṁdravarānaku Uttaramuna gauta
mi tūṟupuna vēdādri śrīnarasiṁhvadē
vara peddamaṁṭtapaṁlōnē vāyavyamaṁdu
na parāṁkuśulanu murāninēni śrīrāma
niṁgāru Aru pratiṣṭa śēyiṁccivāriki Aru
bōnamunaku vēdādrilō komaragiri puli
ṁbōlōnanu pedda ceṟuvu kōmaragiri samudra U
daka sahidaṁgānu Āpallelōna teluṁgari
ceṟuvu venaka tudagānu varipolaṁ kha 11 nu
khaṁḍuṁbōne Ā Uttarāna garaṣapolamu
kha 10 nu verasi jēnalagaḍanu kha 21
yiṁduku tatkālōcita krayamūlyaṁ
rāyijaṭa 300 nnu
yya bhaṁḍārānaku celliṁcci
krayaṁ puccukoni
baṁgarayyaṁgāru puruṣōttamayya
ṁgāru naṁdagōpayyaṁgāru
yyaṁgāru rājakoṁḍa parāsarayyaṁgā
ru malālarasayyaṁgāru
Ābhayyaṁ gāru
sahatamaina stānaṁ vāri samakṣamu
sahā sarvvamānyaṁgānu daka
dhāravōsi samarppaṇasēsiri
yaṁ sēyiṁpanu parāṁkuśala
ṇaṁpōnu drammulu tama vaśāna
ṇaṁ duku śrībha
jayyaṁgāri bārakulu
Digital edition of SII 37.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
